shadows.name: hearth-glow
shadows.purpose: Standard elevation for curated cards and containers.

shadows.name: interactive-lift
shadows.purpose: Hover state for cards and buttons to signal tactile depth.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call to action for discovery and booking.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #fa6500; color: #fff; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 700; border: none; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); box-shadow: 0 4px 14px 0 rgba(250, 101, 0, 0.3); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #e05a00; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(250, 101, 0, 0.4); }

components.name: Curated Card
components.description: Container for restaurants and trending highlights.
components.html:
The Himalayan Bistro

Modern Nepalese Cuisine
components.css: .ds-card-curated { background: #fff; border-radius: 24px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); transition: all 0.3s ease; border: 1px solid #f3f4f6; } .ds-card-curated:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); } .ds-card-img { height: 180px; background: #f3f4f6; } .ds-card-content { padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title { font-weight: 700; color: #111827; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-card-text { color: #6b7280; font-size: 0.875rem; }

narrative.overview: RestroNet is designed to feel warm, premium, and locally grounded. It rejects the generic 'SaaS dashboard' aesthetic in favor of curated hospitality.

rules.name: The Ten Percent Rule
rules.body: Kathmandu Sunset is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity preserves its impact.

dos: Do use Kathmandu Sunset as a selective spotlight.
Do prioritize large, high-quality food photography.
donts: Don't use border-left side-stripes as accents.
Don't use generic Tailwind-blue or SaaS-purple gradients.
